name: ExtensionManufacturedItemDefinition_Manufacturer
title: R5: Manufacturer of the item, one of several possible (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ManufacturedItemDefinition.manufacturer` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ManufacturedItemDefinition.manufacturer` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Organization)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ManufacturedItemDefinition.manufacturer` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Organization)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ManufacturedItemDefinition.manufacturer` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ManufacturedItemDefinition` is not mapped.
Element `ManufacturedItemDefinition.manufacturer` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
